name: Journal Downloader
description: Batch download PDFs from journal TOC pages + export TOC to Markdown with full title/DOI/links/abstract. Parsers: NEJM, Nature, Science, Lancet, BMJ. Hybrid abstract fetch: Crossref API first → HTML scrape fallback. BMJ parser (v3.7) supports both ID formats (bmj.s713 for News + bmj-2025-087321 for Research), sections This Week/Research/Comment/Education/Obituaries, '🔓 Free to read' for non-OA BMJ items.
